channel.title: Search-Algorithms on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Search-Algorithms on Systology

item.title: Algorithms & Performance
item.description: Principles for clear algorithms and effective performance engineering; utilizing strict micro-benchmarking, careful memory allocation discipline, avoiding cache misses, and deterministic random generators.

item.title: Grit
item.description: A from‑scratch Git implementation in Rust; exploring content-addressable storage, plumbing/porcelain layering, and high-performance object caching.

item.title: Rustoku
item.description: A highly optimized Sudoku engine engineered in Rust, featuring advanced human-like techniques, multi-platform support (Python, WASM), and microsecond-level performance.
